languages.text: {n}Эоганн подхватывает инъектор мехадендритом и впрыскивает остатки в алембик на своем плече, жидкость в котором мгновенно окрашивается в траурно-черный.{/n} "Нервно-паралитический токсин, периферического действия. Нейтрализация вне условий корабельного лазарета не представляется возможной. Прогнозируемое время до летального исхода... исчисляется минутами. Мне жаль".

{n}Eogunn picks up the injector with his mechadendrite and expels the remnants into the alembic on his shoulder, as the liquid inside instantly turns a sombre black.{/n} "A nerve agent of peripheral action. Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн подхватывает инъектор мехадендритом и впрыскивает остатки в алембик на своем плече, жидкость в котором мгновенно окрашивается в траурно-черный.{/n} "Нервно-паралитический токсин, периферического действия. Нейтрализация вне условий корабельного лазарета не представляется возможной. Прогнозируемое время до летального исхода... исчисляется минутами. Мне жаль".

Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."

Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."

Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."

{n}Eogunn picks up the injector with his mechadendrite and expels the remnants into the alembic on his shoulder, as the liquid inside instantly turns a sombre black.{/n} "A nerve agent of peripheral action. Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn recoge el inyector con su mecadendrita y expulsa los restos en el alambique de su hombro. El líquido que contiene se vuelve de un negro sombrío casi al instante.{/n} «Un agente nervioso de acción periférica. Su neutralización solo es posible en la enfermería de la nave. Tiempo estimado para su muerte... cuestión de minutos. Lo siento».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn picks up the injector with his mechadendrite and expels the remnants into the alembic on his shoulder, as the liquid inside instantly turns a sombre black.{/n} "A nerve agent of peripheral action. Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn recoge el inyector con su mecadendrita y expulsa los restos en el alambique de su hombro. El líquido que contiene se vuelve de un negro sombrío casi al instante.{/n} «Un agente nervioso de acción periférica. Su neutralización solo es posible en la enfermería de la nave. Tiempo estimado para su muerte... cuestión de minutos. Lo siento».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡用机械触须拿起注射器，将残余液体挤进他肩上的蒸馏器中，里面的液体瞬间变成了阴沉的漆黑色。{/n}“这是一种外周神经毒剂。只有在舰船医务室内才能完成中和。预计死亡时间……只剩几分钟了。我很遗憾。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn picks up the injector with his mechadendrite and expels the remnants into the alembic on his shoulder, as the liquid inside instantly turns a sombre black.{/n} "A nerve agent of peripheral action. Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡用机械触须拿起注射器，将残余液体挤进他肩上的蒸馏器中，里面的液体瞬间变成了阴沉的漆黑色。{/n}“这是一种外周神经毒剂。只有在舰船医务室内才能完成中和。预计死亡时间……只剩几分钟了。我很遗憾。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn greift mit seinem Mechadendrit nach dem Injektor und leert die Reste in den Kolben auf seiner Schulter, wo sich die enthaltene Flüssigkeit sofort schwarz färbt.{/n} "Ein peripheres Nervengift. Neutralisierung ist außerhalb der Krankenstation des Schiffs unmöglich. Geschätzte Zeit bis zum Tod ... wenige Minuten. Tut mir leid."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn picks up the injector with his mechadendrite and expels the remnants into the alembic on his shoulder, as the liquid inside instantly turns a sombre black.{/n} "A nerve agent of peripheral action. Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn greift mit seinem Mechadendrit nach dem Injektor und leert die Reste in den Kolben auf seiner Schulter, wo sich die enthaltene Flüssigkeit sofort schwarz färbt.{/n} "Ein peripheres Nervengift. Neutralisierung ist außerhalb der Krankenstation des Schiffs unmöglich. Geschätzte Zeit bis zum Tod ... wenige Minuten. Tut mir leid."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn ramasse l'injecteur avec sa mécadendrite et, dès qu'il en vide les dernières gouttes dans l'alambic monté sur son épaule, le liquide à l'intérieur vire au noir d'encre.{/n} « Un agent neurotoxique à action périphérique. Impossible à neutraliser en dehors de l'infirmerie du vaisseau. Le délai avant la mort est estimé à... quelques minutes tout au plus. Je suis {mf|navré|navrée}. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn picks up the injector with his mechadendrite and expels the remnants into the alembic on his shoulder, as the liquid inside instantly turns a sombre black.{/n} "A nerve agent of peripheral action. Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn ramasse l'injecteur avec sa mécadendrite et, dès qu'il en vide les dernières gouttes dans l'alambic monté sur son épaule, le liquide à l'intérieur vire au noir d'encre.{/n} « Un agent neurotoxique à action périphérique. Impossible à neutraliser en dehors de l'infirmerie du vaisseau. Le délai avant la mort est estimé à... quelques minutes tout au plus. Je suis {mf|navré|navrée}. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, mekadentritiyle enjektörü alıyor. Kalıntıları omzundaki imbiğe boşaltırken içindeki sıvı anında kasvetli bir siyaha dönüşüyor.{/n} "Çevresel etkili bir sinir gazı. Gemi reviri dışında etkisiz hâle getirilmesi imkânsız. Ölüme kalan tahminî süre... Birkaç dakika. Üzgünüm."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn picks up the injector with his mechadendrite and expels the remnants into the alembic on his shoulder, as the liquid inside instantly turns a sombre black.{/n} "A nerve agent of peripheral action. Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, mekadentritiyle enjektörü alıyor. Kalıntıları omzundaki imbiğe boşaltırken içindeki sıvı anında kasvetli bir siyaha dönüşüyor.{/n} "Çevresel etkili bir sinir gazı. Gemi reviri dışında etkisiz hâle getirilmesi imkânsız. Ölüme kalan tahminî süre... Birkaç dakika. Üzgünüm."

languages.text:
{n}エオグンは機械腕で注射器を掴み、残りを肩の蒸留器に吐き出す。液体が瞬時に暗黒に染まる。{/n}
「末梢神経作用を持つ神経剤。船内の療養室以外では中和不可能。死亡までの推定時間は...数分。申し訳ありません。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn picks up the injector with his mechadendrite and expels the remnants into the alembic on his shoulder, as the liquid inside instantly turns a sombre black.{/n} "A nerve agent of peripheral action. Neutralisation is impossible outside the ship's infirmary. Estimated time until death... is a matter of minutes. I am sorry."

「末梢神経作用を持つ神経剤。船内の療養室以外では中和不可能。死亡までの推定時間は...数分。申し訳ありません。」
